titleStmt.title: SII 16.206: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 206. (A.R. No. 372 of 1920.) NńÄGALńÄPURAM, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying in front of the ńÄ√Ījanńďya shrine.
This is dated Ňöaka 1777, apparently wrong for Ňöaka 1477, RńĀkshasa, ńÄŇõvńęja, Ňõu. 2 corresponding to 1555 A.D., September 17 (Tuesday).

This damaged record seems to register a gift of the village ńíŠĻ≠ivńęŠłću alias NńĀgalńĀpuram for provision of rice, green-gram and oil for the lamp for the KńĀrttika festivals in the temple of Ňöiva (name not clear) for the merit of the SeŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠i-paŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠asvńĀmins, the gaŠĻáńĀchńĀryas, etc., the disciples of BhikshńĀvŠĻõitti-mahńĀrńĀya.
The gift village is stated to be situated in JagatńĀpigutti-sńęma ruled over by MahńĀmaŠĻáŠłćalńďŇõvara ŇörńęraŠĻÖgarńĀjayyadńďva-mahńĀrńĀju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ňõubhamastu . svastiŇõrńę jayńĀbhyudaya ŇõńĀli
vńĀhana ŇõakavaruŠĻ£aŠĻĀbulu 1477 AgunńďŠĻ≠i
rńĀkŠĻ£asa saŠĻĀvatsara ńÄŇõvńęja Ňõu 2 lu ŇõrńęmanmahńĀ
rńĀjńĀdhirńĀja rńĀjaparamńďŇõvara ŇõrńęvńęrapratńĀpa Ňõrńęsa
dńĀsivadńďvamahńĀrńĀyalu pŠĻõdhvirńĀjyaŠĻĀ cńďyu
cuŠĻĀnnu ŇõrńęmanmahńĀmaŠĻĀŠłćalńďŇõvara ŇõrńęraŠĻĀgarńĀjayya dńďva
mahńĀrńĀjugńĀrka pńĀliŠĻĀcina jagatńĀpiguttisńęmalŇćni ńíŠĻ≠ivńę
ŠĻ≠i grńĀmńĀnaku pratinńĀmamayina nńĀgalńĀpuraŠĻĀ sarvamńĀ
nyaŠĻĀ AgrahńĀraŠĻĀ ŇõrńęmatkailńĀsavńĀsulayi
na triŇõŇęla Šłćamaru gada khaŠłćga liŠĻĀgńĀnaku
Šłća vńęrapurńĀŠĻĀtulu baŠĻĀŠĻ≠ugńĀ sńďviŠĻĀpaŠĻĀga malahari
gńĀru kńĀrttika mahńĀtiranńĀlakuŠĻĀnu di 1 ki biyaŠĻĀnŇę 1
panneŠĻĀŠłću pesalu tu 1 dńępńĀrńĀdhanaku nŇęne ma 8 ki
cńďsńďŠĻ≠aŠĻ≠ugńĀ sahastamastakayŇćgańÄcńĀrapratipńĀlanaku
ńÄgama cńĀra bhikŠĻ£ńĀvrittimahńĀrńĀya divyaŇõrńępńĀdńĀrńĀ
dhakulaku puŠĻĀŠĻáyaŠĻĀmugńĀnu dńďŇõńĀdhńęŇõa
samasta seŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠ipaŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠asvńĀmulaku puŠĻĀŠĻáyaŠĻĀgńĀnu
ratnasiŠĻĀhńĀsanuŠĻĀ
ŇõrńęviprńĀnuliŠĻĀggasamaŠĻĀtulai
na mahaŠĻĀtulakuŠĻĀnnu tripurńĀŠĻĀtalaku vńęrapurńĀŠĻĀtulaku gaŠĻáńĀcńĀ
rulaku puŠĻĀŠĻáyamugńĀnu dhńĀravŇćsi yistimi yńę dharmńĀnaku yavva
ru tappinńĀ doli Anumatini mńęre drŇćhulu
naŠłćapenivńĀru ŇõunakamńĀŠĻĀsaŠĻĀ surńĀ
pńĀnaŠĻĀ sńďviŠĻĀcina pńĀpńĀna pŇćduru AnivrńĀyiŠĻĀccina dharma ŇõńĀsa
namu ŇõrńęŇõrńęŇõrńę .
Digital edition of SII 16.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
